memory:memory/2026-05-11.md:1:35.snippet: # Memory — 2026-05-11 ## JumpKit Session Summary (2026-05-10 afternoon) ### Security Fixes Applied (all committed + pushed) - CORS locked to `https://jumpkit.app` on `send-feedback.js` and `waitlist-signup` Edge Functions - Rate limiting: `send-feedback` 5 req/min, `send-invite` 10 req/min - Team password hashing: SHA-256 → PBKDF2 (100,000 iterations) in `teams.js` - `console.log` → `console.debug` in all production JS (teams.js, db.js, sync.js, app.js, main.js) - Unchecked awaits fixed in `teams.js` (6 locations now log/throw on error) - `npm audit fix` run → 0 vulnerabilities (fixed tar + picomatch) ### Migration Files Reorganized - `supabase/migration_001/002/003.sql` → `supabase/migra

memory:memory/2026-05-21.md:1:19.snippet: # 2026-05-21 ## JumpKit localStorage Security Audit & Cleanup Full audit of all localStorage keys. Identified 10 keys total. ### Decisions made: - **Items 1-3** (jk_theme, jk_sidebar_collapsed, jk_teams_collapsed): Keep in localStorage — UI state only, harmless. - **Items 4-6** (jk_subscription_status, jk_subscription_tier, jk_role): **REMOVED** — security risk, could be tampered to bypass paywalls/roles. Now read exclusively from `window._supabaseProfile` (in-memory, resets from Supabase on every load). Tamper-proof. - **Item 7** (jk_current_user): **REMOVED** — redundant with Supabase session. `DB.setSession/clearSession` made no-ops. Offline fallback simplified to redirect-to-login. -

memory:memory/2026-05-14.md:50:82.snippet: - Join only checks: org name + team name + password hash - Anyone with the invite email forwarded to them can join **Target state (3-factor join):** 1. Correct org name + team name 2. Correct team password (PBKDF2 hash match) 3. User's Supabase account email must exist as a `pending` invite in `team_invites` for that team **Remaining attack vector + fix:** - Attack: Mallory creates JumpKit account using Alice's email before Alice does, then joins - Fix: Enable Supabase email confirmation — new accounts must verify email via inbox link before active - Since only Alice can access her inbox, Mallory is blocked **Implementation steps:** 1. **Add invite check to `joinTeam()` in `teams.js`:**
